bead.title: prompt-ingress: hard-fail oversize on server-side inline ingress (Stage D2)
bead.description:
Stage D2 of FEAT-022. Hard-fail oversize inline prompt bodies on
server-side ingress surfaces (REST request body, exec env var,
docgraph metadata).

Implements FEAT-022 requirement §9. Satisfies US-223 for the
non-CLI paths.

Depends on Stage A1 (ddx-64299657) only. Parallel-safe with D1.

In-scope files (3 sites):
- cli/internal/server/server.go (POST /api/agent/run body.Prompt at
  :1860): check len([]byte(body.Prompt)) against
  evidence.MaxPromptBytes; on oversize, return HTTP 413 Payload Too
  Large with a JSON body { error, observed_bytes, cap_bytes,
  config_hint }. Do NOT silently truncate.
- cli/internal/exec/store.go (DDX_AGENT_PROMPT env var at :180):
  on exec-definition load, check length of the resolved env value;
  on oversize, fail at startup with an error naming the exec
  definition, the env var, observed size, and cap.
- cli/internal/docgraph/docgraph.go (docgraph prompt metadata at
  :520): on graph build, cap prompt-metadata string lengths the same
  way; oversize values fail the graph build with an actionable error.

Out-of-scope:
- Agent-side file readers — Stage D1.
- Server text egress — Stage E1/E2.
- Any client-side UI for the new 413 response code — separate work.

Rollback: revert the cap checks and error returns at each site;
behavior returns to prior (unbounded) state.
bead.acceptance: cd cli && go test -run TestServerInlinePromptOversize ./internal/server/... passes: httptest-driven test posts a JSON body with a 2× MaxPromptBytes prompt field to /api/agent/run; asserts response status is 413; asserts response body JSON contains error, observed_bytes, cap_bytes, config_hint fields. cd cli && go test -run TestExecStoreOversizePromptEnv ./internal/exec/... passes: fixture exec definition with DDX_AGENT_PROMPT = 2× MaxPromptBytes; assert store.Load returns a non-nil error whose message names the exec definition, the env var, observed size, cap. cd cli && go test -run TestDocgraphOversizePromptMetadata ./internal/docgraph/... passes: fixture docgraph entry with prompt metadata = 2× MaxPromptBytes; assert graph build fails with an actionable error. cd cli && go test ./... passes.

governing.title: Feature: Prompt Evidence Assembly and Size Invariants
